instructions: You are the PRIMARY independent baseline face-sculpt evaluator for run face-search-20260720-031640. Read-only: do not edit any file. Use view_image at original detail to inspect the approved target front Reference/painted-a-front-flat-v2.png and the current champion views Derived/sculpt-v13/front.png, three-quarter.png, and profile.png. Compare target directly with champion front; use 3/4 and profile only to reject anatomy regressions. Ignore lighting, skin color, hair, eyebrows, texture, and presentation quality completely. Judge only skull/facial silhouette, feature placement and projection, age structure, asymmetry, anatomical continuity, grounded mature geometry, and individual character. The only selectable axes are: head_width, head_height, jaw_taper, chin_projection, nose_width, nose_length, nose_projection, eye_spacing, cheek_definition, lip_volume, eye_bag. Do not infer or request parameter values. Return only the requested JSON baseline diagnosis. Rank only effects those axes can actually change. Do not promote anything.

rankedMismatches.reason: Champion narrows into a pointed lower face; target keeps a broader, more squared jaw and chin base.
Champion nose reads visibly longer from bridge to tip than the target's compact nose.
Profile shows the champion nose projecting too far forward relative to the target's more restrained mature profile.
Champion eyes sit too widely apart, weakening the target's tighter central facial grouping.
Champion nasal base and tip are narrower than the target's broader, rounder nose.
Champion has overly linear hollow cheek transitions; target has grounded but softer cheek volume.

unavailableGeometryGaps: Brow ridge, forehead planes, and orbital/eyelid shapes do not match the target and are not selectable axes.
Mouth width, lip corner shape, philtrum, and nasolabial transitions need geometry unavailable through the configured axes.
Ear shape and placement differ from the target and are unavailable.
response.mostImportantError: The champion's strongly tapered, pointed lower face misses the target's broad, mature jaw-and-chin silhouette.
